title: 翻译专项练习题库
description: CET-4 汉译英专项训练，涵盖社会、文化、科技、教育、经济等常考话题。每道题包含中文原文、参考译文、翻译要点和难度等级。

items.chineseText: 越来越多的中国年轻人选择在业余时间参加志愿者活动。他们相信，通过帮助他人，不仅能给社会带来积极的影响，也能丰富自己的人生经历。
items.referenceTranslation: More and more young Chinese people are choosing to participate in volunteer activities in their spare time. They believe that by helping others, they can not only bring positive influence to society but also enrich their own life experiences.
keyPoints: 「越来越多的」→ more and more / an increasing number of
「业余时间」→ spare time / free time
「不仅...也...」→ not only...but also...
「丰富人生经历」→ enrich one's life experiences

items.chineseText: 春节是中国最重要的传统节日，已经有几千年的历史了。在这期间，人们会回家与家人团聚，吃年夜饭，放鞭炮，并互相赠送红包以表达祝福。
items.referenceTranslation: The Spring Festival is the most important traditional festival in China, with a history of several thousand years. During this period, people return home to reunite with their families, have a New Year's Eve dinner, set off firecrackers, and give each other red envelopes to express their blessings.
keyPoints: 「最重要的传统节日」→ the most important traditional festival
「已经有几千年的历史了」→ with a history of several thousand years
「与家人团聚」→ reunite with one's family
「红包」→ red envelopes
「表达祝福」→ express blessings

items.chineseText: 近年来，人工智能技术在中国取得了飞速发展，广泛应用于医疗、教育和交通等领域。专家预测，到2030年，中国将成为全球人工智能创新的领导者之一。
items.referenceTranslation: In recent years, artificial intelligence technology has achieved rapid development in China and has been widely applied in fields such as healthcare, education, and transportation. Experts predict that by 2030, China will become one of the global leaders in AI innovation.
keyPoints: 「近年来」→ in recent years
「取得了飞速发展」→ has achieved rapid development
「广泛应用于」→ has been widely applied in
「全球...领导者之一」→ one of the global leaders in...

items.chineseText: 中国的高等教育体系在过去几十年里经历了巨大的变革。越来越多的大学开始注重培养学生的创新能力和实践技能，而非仅仅关注考试成绩。
items.referenceTranslation: China's higher education system has undergone tremendous changes over the past few decades. More and more universities have begun to focus on cultivating students' innovative abilities and practical skills rather than merely focusing on exam scores.
keyPoints: 「经历了巨大的变革」→ has undergone tremendous changes
「在过去几十年里」→ over the past few decades
「注重培养」→ focus on cultivating
「创新能力」→ innovative abilities
「而非仅仅」→ rather than merely

items.chineseText: 电子商务的兴起极大地改变了中国人的购物方式。如今，消费者只需通过手机就能购买到来自世界各地的商品，这种便利性是十年前难以想象的。
items.referenceTranslation: The rise of e-commerce has greatly changed the way Chinese people shop. Today, consumers can purchase goods from all over the world simply through their mobile phones, a convenience that was unimaginable ten years ago.
keyPoints: 「电子商务的兴起」→ the rise of e-commerce
「极大地改变了」→ has greatly changed
「只需通过手机」→ simply through their mobile phones
「来自世界各地」→ from all over the world
「难以想象的」→ unimaginable

items.chineseText: 为了应对日益严重的环境污染问题，中国政府已经采取了一系列措施，包括推广新能源汽车、建设更多的城市绿地和实施更严格的排放标准。这些努力已经取得了初步成效。
items.referenceTranslation: To address the increasingly serious problem of environmental pollution, the Chinese government has adopted a series of measures, including promoting new energy vehicles, building more urban green spaces, and implementing stricter emission standards. These efforts have already achieved initial results.
keyPoints: 「为了应对」→ to address / to cope with
「日益严重的」→ increasingly serious
「采取了一系列措施」→ has adopted a series of measures
「推广新能源汽车」→ promoting new energy vehicles
「取得了初步成效」→ have achieved initial results

items.chineseText: 茶文化在中国有着悠久的历史，可以追溯到四千多年前。在中国，茶不仅是一种饮品，更是一种生活方式的象征。无论是商务会谈还是朋友聚会，一壶好茶总能让交流更加融洽。
items.referenceTranslation: Tea culture has a long history in China, dating back more than 4,000 years. In China, tea is not merely a beverage but a symbol of a way of life. Whether it is a business meeting or a gathering of friends, a pot of good tea always makes communication more harmonious.
keyPoints: 「有着悠久的历史」→ has a long history
「可以追溯到」→ dating back to
「不仅...更是...」→ not merely...but...
「无论是...还是...」→ whether it is...or...
「让交流更加融洽」→ makes communication more harmonious

items.chineseText: 随着人口老龄化的加剧，养老问题已成为中国社会面临的一大挑战。许多家庭不得不同时承担照顾老人和抚养子女的双重责任，这给年轻一代带来了巨大的经济和精神压力。
items.referenceTranslation: With the intensification of population aging, elderly care has become a major challenge facing Chinese society. Many families have to shoulder the dual responsibility of taking care of the elderly and raising children at the same time, which brings enormous economic and mental pressure to the younger generation.
keyPoints: 「随着...的加剧」→ with the intensification of
「人口老龄化」→ population aging
「已成为」→ has become
「承担双重责任」→ shoulder the dual responsibility
「巨大的经济和精神压力」→ enormous economic and mental pressure

items.chineseText: 移动支付已经彻底改变了中国人的消费习惯。无论是在大型商场还是街边小摊，人们都可以通过扫描二维码完成支付。这种便捷的支付方式也吸引了越来越多的外国游客。
items.referenceTranslation: Mobile payment has completely transformed the spending habits of Chinese people. Whether in large shopping malls or at street vendors, people can complete payments by scanning QR codes. This convenient payment method has also attracted more and more foreign tourists.
keyPoints: 「彻底改变了」→ has completely transformed
「消费习惯」→ spending habits
「无论是...还是...」→ whether...or...
「扫描二维码」→ scan QR codes
「便捷的支付方式」→ convenient payment method

items.chineseText: 近年来，在线教育在中国蓬勃发展，为数千万学生提供了灵活的学习机会。然而，专家指出，在线教育的质量参差不齐，如何确保教学效果仍然是一个亟待解决的问题。此外，长期面对屏幕可能对学生的视力造成不良影响，这一点也需要引起家长和教育工作者的重视。
items.referenceTranslation: In recent years, online education has flourished in China, providing flexible learning opportunities for tens of millions of students. However, experts point out that the quality of online education varies considerably, and how to ensure teaching effectiveness remains a problem that needs to be solved urgently. Moreover, prolonged screen exposure may have adverse effects on students' eyesight, which is something that parents and educators also need to pay attention to.
keyPoints: 「蓬勃发展」→ has flourished / has boomed
「数千万学生」→ tens of millions of students
「参差不齐」→ varies considerably
「亟待解决的问题」→ a problem that needs to be solved urgently
「长期面对屏幕」→ prolonged screen exposure
「引起...的重视」→ need to pay attention to / need to take seriously
